question: HOW CAN I JOIN KAC?
answer: You can fill out this form, or contact us at kiwiasian@gmail.com or via our social media and one of our execs will happily follow up. You can also find us at our stall on the UoA campus during the O-Week of each semester.

question: DO I HAVE TO BE ASIAN TO JOIN KAC?
answer: Nope! KAC welcomes members from all ethnicities and backgrounds.

question: DOES IT COST TO JOIN KAC?
answer: Yes, it costs $5 for a full year membership for both new and returning members.

question: I SIGNED UP ONLINE, HOW DO I PICKUP MY CARD?
answer: We run a card-pickup stall every two weeks - keep an eye out on our Instagram story to see when and where our next one is!

question: WHAT IF I JOIN KAC HALFWAY THROUGH THE SEMESTER?
answer: Don’t be worried if you didn’t join us right at the beginning! KAC runs weekly events with lots of new members each week so you won’t be alone! We run team-based events with the aim of getting people to know each other and create friendships.  Our old members will be happy to show you the ropes and our friendly exec team will take care of you :).

question: CAN I JOIN KAC IF I'M NOT STUDYING AT THE UNIVERSITY OF AUCKLAND?
answer: Yes! Non-UoA students and AUT students are all welcome to join.
